stubs.title: Multi-agent role templates (researcher, coder, reviewer, planner).
Agent personality packs with profile switching.
Dynamic agent spawning by task complexity.
Agent run modes: fast, balanced, deep.
Tool budget caps per agent run.
Agent handoff protocol between specialist agents.
Shared agent directories and team defaults.
Conflict and lock management for edits.
Commenting and review threads on tasks.
Skill registry contracts with frontmatter-driven runtime requirements and install specs.
Skill moderation snapshots, malware/suspicion gates, and role-based delete/restore lifecycle.
Canonical slug ownership operations (rename/merge/redirect) and compatibility-safe install flows.
Structured skill packaging metadata (`origin`, lockfiles, deterministic zip/build provenance).
Sandbox-first claw deployment with layered controls (network/filesystem/process/inference).
Inference indirection via controlled gateway route instead of direct model endpoint exposure.
Policy tiering (restricted/balanced/open) with operator approval loops and hot-reloadable controls.
Blueprint/image hardening patterns (digest pinning, stripped build tools, startup integrity checks).
Desktop claw UX pattern: dual-process host API proxy with WS/HTTP/IPC fallback and gateway supervision.
Multi-agent account binding and channel routing models (`@agent` direct context switching).
Swarm CLI model: team spawn, task dependencies, inbox messaging, worktree isolation, lifecycle protocol.
Worker persistence loops (idle/report/receive/replan) for long-running autonomous teams.
Economic execution loop: task valuation, artifact submission, quality scoring, cost-aware survivability.
Artifact-first submission/evaluation protocol with path validation and auto-wrap-up on iteration limits.
Asynchronous RL loop for claw agents (conversation-derived reward, proxy training, continuous improvement).
Multi-mode RL methods (binary RL, OPD, hybrid) and environment-specific rails (terminal/GUI/SWE/tool-call).
Research pipeline orchestration as stage machine with gate checkpoints and optional human co-pilot.
Agent/skill discovery contracts in claw CLIs with structured JSON output and source precedence.
Plugin contract validation against unsupported manifest fields to prevent silent compatibility drift.
Claw-native docs posture: operation guides, troubleshooting, policy docs, and explicit runbook commands.
Interrupt/resume with human approval and staged continuation.
Multi-agent handoff contracts and delegation semantics.
Planner ledger and iterative plan revision loops.
Tool loop governance (max iterations, force-final mode, retries).
Transport abstraction (stdio + streamable HTTP + legacy SSE).
Capability negotiation cache per session and server profile.
Elicitation and sampling bridges for client-assisted reasoning.
Tool annotation-driven safety hints (read-only, destructive, idempotent).
Browser automation split: accessibility snapshot vs vision coordinates.
Repo map generation for large-codebase context compression.
Architect/editor split mode for reasoning vs edit execution.
Session replay and trace-based judge/evaluator loops.
Memory extraction, deduplication, decay, and profile summarization.
Graph memory relations (entity and relationship persistence).
Policy packs and allowlist-driven extension governance.
Sandboxed app/UI extensions with CSP and permission metadata.
Unified telemetry for cost, latency, quality, and incidents.

Add run judge/eval loop with replay in `src/metrics` + `src/artifacts`. [CM-018]
Add memory dedup + contradiction pipeline in `src/memory`. [CM-019]

Add `clawdis`-style skill metadata schema support (requires/env/install/os/config) in `src/skills` + `src/plugins`. [CCM-001]

Add canonical package identity operations (rename/merge/alias redirects) in `src/marketplace`. [CCM-003]
Add install provenance files and lock metadata for reproducible skill installs in `src/artifacts` + `src/config`. [CCM-004]

Add policy tiers and operator approval workflow in `src/safety` + `src/hooks`. [CCM-007]
Add hardened runtime validation hooks (image/source checksum + config integrity checks) in `src/core` + `src/secrets`. [CCM-008]
Add host-proxy transport fallback strategy for desktop/embedded clients in `src/gateway` + `src/adapters`. [CCM-009]
Add per-agent channel/account binding model in `src/teams` + `src/core/types.ts`. [CCM-010]
Add swarm orchestration primitives (team spawn, dependency tasks, inbox commands) in `src/teams` + `src/workflows`. [CCM-011]
Add worker lifecycle protocol states (active/idle/shutdown pending) in `src/core/orchestrator.ts` + `src/teams`. [CCM-012]
Add economic-mode optional module (task valuation, token spend, payout simulation) in `src/metrics` + `src/workflows`. [CCM-013]
Add artifact submission contract with pre-submit validation and auto-wrap-up hooks in `src/artifacts` + `src/hooks`. [CCM-014]
Add online adaptation interface for reward-feedback loops in `src/llm` + `src/metrics` (feature-flagged). [CCM-015]
Add multi-mode training/eval adapter contracts (binary/opd/hybrid) in `src/recipes` + `src/platform`. [CCM-016]
Add stage-gate pipeline template support for long workflows in `src/workflows` + `src/recipes`. [CCM-017]
Add structured discovery outputs for agents/skills/providers in `src/core` + `src/logger`. [CCM-018]
Add plugin manifest compatibility validator with explicit unsupported-field diagnostics in `src/plugins` + `src/safety`. [CCM-019]
Add operations runbook generator for common claw maintenance tasks in `src/recipes` + `src/workspace`. [CCM-020]
